channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Nippon Ichi Software announces side-scrolling action game GOBBLE for PS5, Switch 2, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
■ Specifications

  • Title: GOBBLE
  • Genre: Side-Scrolling Action
  • Platforms: PlayStation 5, Switch 2, Switch, PC (Steam / Windows)
  • Release Date: September 24, 2026 (Japan)
  • Players: 1
  • Price:
    • Physical Edition: 7,200 yen (7,920 yen with tax)
    • Digital Edition: 3,618 yen (3,980 yen with tax)
    • Steam / Windows: 3,618 yen (3,980 yen with tax)
  • Publisher: Nippon Ichi Software
  • Development Supervisor / Character Designer: Moe Suzuki
  • CERO Rating: Pending
  • Official Website: nippon1.jp
  • Official Hashtag: #GOBBLE
  • Copyright: ©2026 Nippon Ichi Software, Inc.

■ About

GOBBLE is a new 2D side-scrolling action game born from Nippon Ichi Software’s internal “Project Pitch Fest,” the event that produced titles such as Yomawari and The Liar Princess and the Blind Prince. Its cartoon-style graphics and lively animations bring the screen to life, creating a pop yet dark world that’s fun to watch as well as play.

■ Story

A long time ago, this world was overflowing with terrifying creatures, called “Monsters.” These monsters were led by an evil “Demon King,” who terrorized the lives of people. In this hopeless situation, one young man stood up against the Demon King. He proved victorious in battle, and once the Demon King was slain, all monsters simultaneously disappeared. The brave young man become known as the “Hero.”

Luto grew up listening to this story. But appearing in front of him now are those very monsters that were thought to be extinct. Having no skill to fight these monsters, Luto found himself in a pinch. Just then, an arrogant and selfish bird monster appeared.

“Use me.”

Guided by this hungry monster, the peace that filled everyday life begins to crumble.

“I am hungry!!”

■ Characters

Luto
The boy who aspires to be a hero.

Luto is a brave, but reckless boy who lives with his family in a small village. When the monsters appeared, he ignored his family’s pleas to stop and ran towards the chaos, where he found himself in a dangerous situation.

This is where he meets “Camael,” the suspicious-looking monster. He unwillingly listens to Camael, and sets off on a journey to find his family.

Camael
The self-proclaimed strongest monster.

A monster that looks like a bird, that speaks human words. It looks down on humans and uses Luto as its “servant” in order to satisfy its hunger.

A strange monster who preys upon other monsters, and it is able to use the powers of whatever it consumes. It does not have much interests outside of feeding, and constantly clashes with Luto.

■ Cartoon-Style Graphics

The cartoonish design of this game is one of its main selling points.

The exaggerated and vibrant art style has characters with lots of facial expressions, which help the liveliness of the graphics.

—It’s fun to simply watch the characters express themselves.

■ Onomatopoeia

When entering a stage, you will see onomatopoeia that pops up as effects to such things like Luto’s actions and the sound of wind.

Going hand-in-hand with the cartoon-ish style, whenever actions like running or jumping are performed, the words “DASH” and “HOP” appears, making it seem like you are watching an exciting anime.

—Each of Luto’s actions are accompanied by an onomatopoeia.

—Words like “chilly” and “drafty” help set a cold atmosphere.

■ Comic

Throughout the story are graphic inserts reminiscent of scenes from a comic book. Players can “enjoy by just watching” through these inserts that provide much more than when the scene is just words to read off the screen.

—Impressive comics have dynamic art!

—They can even appear when you are progressing through the stage.

■ “Predation”: The Key to Gameplay

The stages that Luto progresses through are filled with monsters! Using Camael’s powers, you need to face the monsters and fight back. Defeated monsters can be consumed.

When consuming enemies, the number of predation hearts—which takes place of HP—increase. Additionally, depending on the monster consumed, you will be able to steal their power and use it in advantageous ways to clear the stage!

—A corpse appears after defeating an enemy…which means it’s time for predation!

—When consuming, the word “GOBBLE” appears in large letters!

In order to satisfy Camael’s hunger, you need to consume as many monsters as possible!

■ Physical Edition Bonuses

First-Print Limited Edition (7,200 yen / 7,920 yen with tax)

  • A copy of the game
  • Special box
  • Soundtrack CD
  • Art book
  • Rubber keychain
  • Travel stickers (x3)

Nippon1.jp Shop Limited Edition (9,000 yen / 9,900 yen with tax)

  • A copy of the game
  • Special box
  • Soundtrack CD
  • Art book
  • Rubber keychain
  • Travel stickers (x3)
  • Swinging acrylic stand
  • Tin badge (x2)


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/nippon-ichi-software-announces-side-scrolling-action-game-gobble-for-ps5-switch-2-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: New The Witch and the Hundred Knight game announced for iOS, Android
item.content:encoded:
• Smartphone

Due out in fiscal year 2026 in Japan.

Publisher Nippon Ichi Software and developer Rudel have announced a new The Witch and the Hundred Knight game for iOS and Android. It will launch within fiscal year 2026 in Japan.

“We are working hard to develop a title with that will satisfy not only long-time fans of the series, but also those discovering the title for the first time,” Nippon Ichi Software said in a press release. “Please stay tuned for future updates.”

To commemorate the announcement, the digital version of The Witch and the Hundred Knight: Revival Edition for PlayStation 4 is currently on sale at 60 percent-off discount price in Japan.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/new-the-witch-and-the-hundred-knight-game-announced-for-ios-android
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Nippon Ichi Software announces Nippon Ichi PC Games service
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Digital PC games with the physical bonuses.

Nippon Ichi Software has announced “Nippon Ichi PC Games,” a new PC games distribution service for Windows.

Until now, limited physical bonuses such as art books and acrylic stands were only available via console versions of games.

Now, through Nippon Ichi PC Games, PC users can also enjoy these bonuses.

Here is how it works:

  1. Install the Nippon Ichi PC Games application on your PC.
  2. Buy the game via Nippon1.jp Shop.
  3. Install the game via the Nippon Ichi PC Games application.
  4. Play the game on PC.

The Liar Princess and the Blind Prince, which is due out for PC via Steam today, will also be available via Nippon Ichi PC Games. The PC version will be available at a 33 percent-off discount price until March 26, while the existing PlayStation 4 and Switch versions will also be discounted by 50 percent until March 25 in Japan.

Visit the Nippon Ichi PC Games official website here.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/nippon-ichi-software-announces-nippon-ichi-pc-games-service
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Nippon Ichi Software announces party game project Prinny Sugoroku for PS5, Switch 2, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

Due out this fall in Japan.

Nippon Ichi Software has announced party game project name Prinny Sugoroku. It will launch for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam this fall in Japan for 6,980 yen (7,678 yen with tax).

Here are the first details:

As a new challenge for Nippon Ichi Software, we are taking on the “party game” genre, something we have never attempted before. The project name is Prinny Sugoroku.

This title is packed with “wild” experiences that pleasantly defy the image many people have when they hear the word “sugoroku.” Sometimes you’ll fight, sometimes you’ll cooperate, and you’ll always be dragging each other down as you try to outwit your rivals.

Experience the ultimate excitement with your family and friends in this chaotic new take on sugoroku, unlike anything you have ever played before.

And here are some artworks:



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/nippon-ichi-software-announces-party-game-project-prinny-sugoroku-for-ps5-switch-2-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Yomawari: Lost in the Dark coming to PS5 on March 12 in Japan
item.content:encoded:
• PS5

Launching at a 50 percent-off discount price.

Nippon Ichi Software will release a PlayStation 5 version of Yomawari: Lost in the Dark on March 12 at 00:00 in Japan, the company announced.

Yomawari: Lost in the Dark first launched for PlayStation 4 and Switch on April 21, 2022 in Japan, followed by PlayStation 4, Switch, and PC via Steam on October 25, 2022 worldwide.

The PlayStation 5 version will launch at a 50 percent-off discount price for PlayStation Plus members until March 26.

Additionally, the PlayStation 4 and Switch digital versions will be on sale at a 50 percent-off discount price from today until March 25.

Here is an overview of the game, via western publisher NIS America:

About

A young girl awakens in a dark, unfamiliar forest with no recollection of how she got there. As she searches for the way out, she crosses paths with a mysterious individual who reveals to her that she’s been cursed. In order to break the curse, she needs to explore the streets of her town at night to seek out her lost memories. However, malevolent ghosts lurk within the shadows, and the girl must avoid them by running, hiding, and shutting her eyes if she hopes to survive long enough to break her curse.

Key Features

  • The Night Continues – Another chapter of the atmospheric horror series has emerged from the shadows! With a new story set in a frighteningly familiar world, new and returning fans alike can dive right in.
  • Home Sweet Haunt – Eerie sound design and shadowy environments set the stage for gruesome and terrifying ghosts never seen before in the series.
  • New Fear, New Me – For the first time in Yomawari, you can customize your character’s appearance by changing her hairstyle, hair color, clothes, and accessories.
  • See No Evil – Do whatever it takes to survive the terrors of the night. Unveil secrets and specters alike using your flashlight. Find clues while listening to the sound of your heartbeat to detect nearby ghosts, and utilize a new mechanic, closing your eyes, to avoid the gaze of the evil spirits watching you.


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/yomawari-lost-in-the-dark-coming-to-ps5-on-march-12-in-japan
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Shinigami Hime to Ishokan no Kaibutsu demo announced
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

Release date not announced.

Nippon Ichi Software will release a demo for fairy tale-destroying adventure game Shinigami Hime to Ishokan no Kaibutsu, the company announced. A release date was not announced.

Additionally, the first public hands-on demo for Shinigami Hime to Ishokan no Kaibutsu will be playable at Happinet Game Fes! 2026 at Bellesalle Akihabara from March 28 to 29.

Shinigami Hime to Ishokan no Kaibutsu is due out for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, and Switch on April 30 in Japan.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/shinigami-hime-to-ishokan-no-kaibutsu-demo-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Console Archives Sonic Wings Special launches March 12
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Switch 2

12 aero fighters and 24 fighter jets.

Console Archives Sonic Wings Special will launch for PlayStation 5 and Switch 2 on March 12 for $11.99 / 1,200 yen, developer Hamster announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Hamster:

About

12 aero fighters and 24 fighter jets—unite now!

Sonic Wings Special was released by Video System in 1996 for a 32-bit home console.

In this shooting game, a diverse group of fighter pilots from around the world battle to stop a coup staged by an evil organization.

The game features a multi-ending system where the story route changes based on the player’s choices. Choose your ultimate partner and fight to restore world peace!

The Console Archives series is designed to bring classic games originally released on home consoles to modern gaming platforms.

In Console Archives series, features such as customizable button layouts, rapid-fire settings, multiple save points, have been added, to support players in completing these classics.

Additional options include screen layout adjustments and filters that recreate the the nostalgic atmosphere of CRT TVs back in the day, allowing players to customize the visual experience to their preference.

Whether it’s a title you played long ago or one you’re experiencing for the first time, we hope you’ll find a favorite and enjoy the game your way.

Watch the official trailer below.

Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/console-archives-sonic-wings-special-launches-march-12
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Falcom to announce final Trails game during 50th anniversary
item.content:encoded:
Trails Beyond the Horizon II plot already complete.

The latest issue of Weekly Famitsu features a four-page interview with Falcom president Toshihiro Kondo on the company’s 45th anniversary, which it celebrated this week. Kondo discusses the Trails series, Kyoto Xanadu, Ys series, and Dragon Slayer Project.

Here are the notable tidbits:

  • Recording for the Trails in the Sky 2nd Chapter theme song, “Silver Will, Golden Wings,” is already complete.
  • The shift to 2D action in Kyoto Xanadu received both positive and negative reactions, but Kondo assures that it is a fun game. There are four difficulty options. Kyoto was chosen as the city as it is representative of Japan.
  • Development on a new Ys has just begun. (This was already known.) Adol may be the oldest he has ever been in this game.
  • Falcom plans to announce the final entry in the Trails series during the company’s 50th anniversary (2031) and complete it during its 51st year (2032). The plot for the unofficially announced The Legend of Heroes: Trails Beyond the Horizon II is already complete, and the overall ending of the series has been decided. Falcom seems to even have a rough idea of the final protagonist’s profession.
  • As for the newly announced Dragon Slayer Project, Kondo would not say whether it is a remake or new game, but asked that users wait for future announcements.

Thanks, Ryokutya2089.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/03/falcom-to-announce-final-trails-game-during-50th-anniversary
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
